Question: Find the equation of the tangent plane to the surface defined by the function $$f ( x , y ) = x^{3} - x^{2} y + y^{2} - 2 x + 3 y - 2$$ at point $$( -1 , 3 ) .$$

Given the function $$f ( x , y ) = e^{5 - 2 x + 3 y} ,$$ approximate $$f ( 4.1 , 0.9 )$$ using point $$( 4 , 1 )$$ for $$( x_{0} , y_{0} ) .$$ What is the approximate value of $$f ( 4.1 , 0.9 )$$ to four decimal places?
Show that the function $$f ( x , y ) = 3 x - 4 y^{2}$$ is differentiable at point $$( -1 , 2 ) .$$
Answer: $$f ( -1 , 2 ) = -19 , f_{x} ( -1 , 2 ) = 3 , f_{y} ( -1 , 2 ) = -16 , E ( x , y ) = -4 ( y - 2 )^{2} .$$ $$\underset{\left(\right. x , y \left.\right) \rightarrow \left(\right. x_{0} , y_{0} \left.\right)}{\text{lim}} \frac{E \left(\right. x , y \left.\right)}{\sqrt{\left(\left(\right. x - x_{0} \left.\right)\right)^{2} + \left(\left(\right. y - y_{0} \left.\right)\right)^{2}}} & = \underset{\left(\right. x , y \left.\right) \rightarrow \left(\right. -1 , 2 \left.\right)}{\text{lim}} \frac{-4 \left(\left(\right. y - 2 \left.\right)\right)^{2}}{\sqrt{\left(\left(\right. x + 1 \left.\right)\right)^{2} + \left(\left(\right. y - 2 \left.\right)\right)^{2}}} \\ & \leq \underset{\left(\right. x , y \left.\right) \rightarrow \left(\right. -1 , 2 \left.\right)}{\text{lim}} \frac{-4 \left(\right. \left(\left(\right. x + 1 \left.\right)\right)^{2} + \left(\left(\right. y - 2 \left.\right)\right)^{2} \left.\right)}{\sqrt{\left(\left(\right. x + 1 \left.\right)\right)^{2} + \left(\left(\right. y - 2 \left.\right)\right)^{2}}} \\ & = \underset{\left(\right. x , y \left.\right) \rightarrow \left(\right. 2 , -3 \left.\right)}{\text{lim}} - 4 \sqrt{\left(\left(\right. x + 1 \left.\right)\right)^{2} + \left(\left(\right. y - 2 \left.\right)\right)^{2}} \\ & = 0.$$

Question: Find the differential $$d z$$ of the function $$f ( x , y ) = 4 y^{2} + x^{2} y - 2 x y$$ and use it to approximate $$\text{Delta} z$$ at point $$( 1 , -1 ) .$$ Use $$\text{Delta} x = 0.03$$ and $$\text{Delta} y = -0.02 .$$ What is the exact value of $$\text{Delta} z ?$$
